title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
